hero.title: Akhdan Ravi Andaman
hero.subtitle: App Developer & Fullstack Web Developer
hero.description: Software engineer with a passion for building products at the intersection of mobile and web. From Bangkit Academy to production apps — I bring ideas to life, love unique experiences, and have a sharp design sense.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph_1: I'm Akhdan Ravi Andaman — an Mobile and Fullstack Web Developer based in Bogor, Indonesia. I hold a Bachelor of Applied Science in Software Engineering from IPB University (GPA 3.67/4.00), with hands-on experience at Bangkit Academy led by Google, Tokopedia, Gojek & Traveloka, and as an App Developer at PT Mitra Graha Integrasi.
about.paragraph_2: My core focus is mobile development using React Native, Kotlin, and Flutter — building intuitive, high-performance apps for iOS and Android. On the web side, I craft modern frontends with Next.js and Vue.js, backed by solid fullstack architecture.
about.paragraph_3: But I'm more than just a developer. I've guided international travel groups as a Tour Leader — sharpening my communication, adaptability, and cross-cultural skills. I'm comfortable collaborating with global teams as I am shipping production-ready code.

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.subtitle: From mobile to web — here's what powers my work.

experience.title: Experience & Education
experience.subtitle: A journey of building, learning, and shipping — across startups, corporates, and academia.

description: Developing and maintaining iOS applications using React Native for enterprise IT consulting clients.
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into polished mobile features.
Participating in the full software development lifecycle, from planning and design to deployment and support.

items.company: PT. Godongijo Asri – The Waterfall Resto & Monster Fishing Lake
description: Led the development of an Augmented Reality mobile experience for a nature-based hospitality business.
Designed and built interactive 3D assets integrated into an Android application using Unity.
Delivered an AR feature that enhanced the visitor experience and was presented to company stakeholders.
Gained hands-on experience bridging creative design and mobile engineering in a real business context.

items.company: Bangkit Academy by Google, Tokopedia, Gojek & Traveloka
description: Selected for the prestigious Bangkit Academy cohort — a Google-led program in partnership with Tokopedia, Gojek, and Traveloka.
Specialized in the Android path with a focus on Kotlin and Machine Learning integration in mobile apps.
Collaborated on a capstone project, applying ML models to an Android application with a team of six.
Strengthened version control and collaborative development practices through intensive GitHub workflows.

items.role: Bachelor of Applied Science – Software Engineering
description: Graduated with a GPA of 3.67 / 4.00 in Applied Software Engineering.
Coursework covered mobile development, web engineering, software architecture, databases, and UI/UX design.
Actively involved in campus organizations. Served as vice chairman of the IT organization on campus.
Active contributor to campus tech communities and software project teams throughout the program.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of work I've built — from mobile apps to web platforms.

items.name: Company Profile Website — PT Mitra Graha Integrasi
items.description: Built the frontend interface for an IT Solution company specializing in audio visual and system integration. Developed using Next.js and NestJS, with Prisma ORM and MySQL as the database. Collaborated with the team via GitLab and hosted on a private VPS.

items.name: ReflectQ iOS & Mobile
items.description: Developed a cross-platform mobile application for Android and iOS focused on enhancing users' spiritual well-being. Built with React Native and Expo Framework, with Supabase as the backend database and TypeScript for type safety.

items.name: Caloriewise
items.description: A Kotlin-based Android application developed during Bangkit Academy led by Google, Tokopedia, Gojek & Traveloka. The app helps users track calorie intake using machine learning and TensorFlow Lite for food recognition. Collaborated via GitHub as an Android Developer.

items.name: Company Profile Website
items.description: Built the frontend interface for a professional training and certification company. Designed to present the company's services and credentials in a clean, professional layout. Developed using Laravel with a MySQL database.

innovations.title: Innovations
innovations.subtitle: Research-driven projects — award-winning work, published journals, and community impact.

items.name: Village Waste Bank Calculation Website
items.description: Design and development of a waste bank recording website themed 'Empowerment of Sukajaya Village Youth Using Digital Based Waste Bank through Program Clean Up the Village'. This project was awarded 2nd place at a national level competition (P2MD) held by the Ministry of Education and Culture.

items.name: Android-based Trash Sorting Game
items.description: A Unity-based Android mobile game designed to educate players on how to sort different types of trash through engaging gameplay with multiple difficulty levels. This research has been officially registered and copyrighted under Indonesian Intellectual Property (HKI).

items.name: Serverless Information Monitoring System (MONIKA)
items.description: Developed a serverless monitoring system utilizing Google Workspace tools, with Google Cloud for storage, Google Apps Script for backend scripting, and Google Sites for the web interface. This research was presented at Seminar Nasional Karsa Nusantara and published in the Melekit journal.
